title: ios-build-fix output
description: Outcome of applying a single ios-build-diagnose finding (or group of same-rule findings) to a real Xcode project on a throwaway branch, with pre- and post-fix measurements. The fixer refuses to claim success when the actual wall-clock delta is null, regressive, or within variance noise; outcome carries that verdict explicitly. Read alongside the diagnosis and (optionally) simulation artifacts that drove the fix decision.

target.description: The diagnose finding(s) this fix targets. source_finding_indices points back into diagnosis.findings[] (non-negative) or additional_recommendations[] via the -1-N convention (mirrors simulation.schema).

predicted.description: Predicted clean and incremental delta seconds from the simulation artifact, when one was supplied. Both null when no simulation artifact was loaded.

files_modified.description: Repository-relative paths of every file touched by the fix.

submodule_changes.description: If the fix lives in a submodule, the submodule path and its before/after commit SHAs.

variance_threshold_percent.description: Percent-of-baseline floor below which |delta| is classified as noise. Default 10.0 — matches the measure-gate spec and a representative clean-build observed spread (~11% at repeats=5).

outcome.description: The fixer's verdict. success = at least one axis with a meaningful improvement. refused-null = relevant axis missing in measurement (e.g. clean axis requested but post-measurement only has incremental). refused-regressive = delta non-negative on every measured axis. refused-noise = |delta| within variance_threshold_percent on every measured axis. refused-apply-error = fix could not be applied; tree reset. refused-benchmark-error = pre or post measurement crashed.

outcome_reason.description: One-sentence human-readable explanation of the outcome decision (e.g. 'incremental delta -4.4s on 51.8s baseline = 8.5% < 10% variance threshold').

tuning_data_point.description: Required (mirror simulate schema): project + run + observed delta to feed back into the next iteration of the simulate predictor. E.g. 'F1 random-sleep removed -> incremental Δ -5.7s on 51.8s baseline (predicted -5.5s, within ±50%)'.

MeasurementRef.description: Reference to a measurement.json artifact produced by ios-build-measure. We do not inline the full artifact; the path is required for traceability and the schema_version + git_sha are pinned in this record so a stale measurement is detectable.

AxisDelta.description: Per-axis (clean or incremental) actual-vs-baseline delta. delta_seconds = post_median - baseline_median (negative = improvement). exceeds_variance true iff |delta_seconds| > variance_threshold_percent * max(baseline_median, post_median) / 100. within_predicted_band true iff |delta - predicted| <= 0.5 * |predicted| (the simulate ±50% rule from PLAN.md Verification §Simulate gate); null when predicted is null.
